email.bodyPreview:
Dear Team,

We are excited to announce that the Digital Transformation project with Acme Industries has been officially WON! 

Project Details:
- Project Value: 25,000 EUR

- Notes: Client wants a fast kickoff and weekly reporting.

Please ensure all preparations are made for a smooth kickoff. 

Best,
Sales Owner
